Item 1. Business

The Company designs, manufactures, and sells consumer electronics and accessories worldwide. BUSINESSMARKER. Our products are sold through retail stores, online channels, and direct enterprise relationships. We invest heavily in research and development to differentiate our hardware and our integrated software. Brand strength and customer loyalty support recurring purchases across our family of products. We operate manufacturing partnerships across several regions to scale production efficiently and reliably. The Company designs, manufactures, and sells consumer electronics and accessories worldwide. BUSINESSMARKER. Our products are sold through retail stores, online channels, and direct enterprise relationships. We invest heavily in research and development to differentiate our hardware and our integrated software. Brand strength and customer loyalty support recurring purchases across our family of products. We operate manufacturing partnerships across several regions to scale production efficiently and reliably. The Company designs, manufactures, and sells consumer electronics and accessories worldwide. BUSINESSMARKER. Our products are sold through retail stores, online channels, and direct enterprise relationships. We invest heavily in research and development to differentiate our hardware and our integrated software. Brand strength and customer loyalty support recurring purchases across our family of products. We operate manufacturing partnerships across several regions to scale production efficiently and reliably.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Our results may be harmed by supply chain disruption and component shortages. RISKMARKER. Tariffs, trade restrictions, and geopolitical tensions could materially increase our costs. A cybersecurity incident or data breach could damage our reputation and our operations. We depend on a limited number of large customers for a significant portion of revenue. Inflation and adverse macroeconomic conditions may reduce overall consumer spending. Our results may be harmed by supply chain disruption and component shortages. RISKMARKER. Tariffs, trade restrictions, and geopolitical tensions could materially increase our costs. A cybersecurity incident or data breach could damage our reputation and our operations. We depend on a limited number of large customers for a significant portion of revenue. Inflation and adverse macroeconomic conditions may reduce overall consumer spending. Our results may be harmed by supply chain disruption and component shortages. RISKMARKER. Tariffs, trade restrictions, and geopolitical tensions could materially increase our costs. A cybersecurity incident or data breach could damage our reputation and our operations. We depend on a limited number of large customers for a significant portion of revenue. Inflation and adverse macroeconomic conditions may reduce overall consumer spending.

Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments

None.

Item 2. Properties

We lease office and warehouse space in several locations.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis

Management reviews operating performance, liquidity, and capital resources each period. MDNAMARKER. Revenue grew compared with the prior year, driven by stronger unit demand across regions. Gross margin improved modestly as input costs stabilized over the course of the year. We returned cash to shareholders through buybacks while continuing disciplined reinvestment. Our liquidity position remains strong, supported by ample cash generated from operations. Management reviews operating performance, liquidity, and capital resources each period. MDNAMARKER. Revenue grew compared with the prior year, driven by stronger unit demand across regions. Gross margin improved modestly as input costs stabilized over the course of the year. We returned cash to shareholders through buybacks while continuing disciplined reinvestment. Our liquidity position remains strong, supported by ample cash generated from operations. Management reviews operating performance, liquidity, and capital resources each period. MDNAMARKER. Revenue grew compared with the prior year, driven by stronger unit demand across regions. Gross margin improved modestly as input costs stabilized over the course of the year. We returned cash to shareholders through buybacks while continuing disciplined reinvestment. Our liquidity position remains strong, supported by ample cash generated from operations.
